item.title: TheShotgunStart: Kevin Van Valkenburg reposteó The Shotgun Start @TheShotgunStart · 22h Mr. @TheRealPJClark finds himself back in the B
item.description:
Kevin Van Valkenburg reposteó The Shotgun Start @TheShotgunStart · 22h Mr. @TheRealPJClark finds himself back in the Big Chair alongside @garrett_TFE as they recap an... interesting... last few days for LIV Golf.
Is the PIF invested past 2026? Will Bryson re-sign after this year? Are new sponsors enough to keep LIV alive? youtube.com The latest on LIV Golf: Will Saudi PIF continue funding after 2026? |... Mr. PJ finds himself in the "Big Chair" once again with Andy, Brendan, and KVV in Scotland this week! He's joined by Fried Egg Golf's Garrett Morrison, also ... 2 5 38 41 mil

item.title: brucemillington: Bruce Millington @brucemillington · 1h These people trying to ban greyhound racing should focus their energy on dealing
item.description:
Bruce Millington @brucemillington · 1h These people trying to ban greyhound racing should focus their energy on dealing with all the actual animal cruelty that goes on. But that takes effort and doesn’t get them as much easy publicity. Cita Zack Polanski @ZackPolanski · 2h "Hannah added: “I get offended when I hear the argument made that it is working class. Working-class people are fed up with gambling companies being able to wreak havoc in people’s lives.”
https:// theguardian.com/politics/2026/ apr/18/green-mp-hannah-spencer-labour-caricatures-working-class-people-over-greyhounds-ban … 2 4 38 3 mil
